title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.11.5 - Draw/discard pile previews now show each card's live combat value (base damage/block plus its current Tuned bonus, scaling with every Tuned card in your deck), so you can see what a card will actually hit or block for without playing it.
